core_payload.content:
# Calendar

## 1. Role
Calendar will become the intelligent temporal surface of N1Hub where commitments, plans, reminders, review windows, and external obligations are projected into lived time without flattening their branch meaning.

## 2. Future Temporal Contract
Calendar will distinguish fixed Real commitments, provisional Dream plans, review blocks, focus windows, recovery space, and background autonomy windows. Time will therefore express not only when something is scheduled, but what kind of scheduling truth it represents.

## 3. Operational Consequence
The user will be able to see whether a day is carrying committed execution, exploratory planning, overloaded aspiration, or quiet recovery. Calendar will become a branch-aware and rhythm-aware control layer rather than a passive grid of dates.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Calendar supports To Dig Deep by making lived time an intelligent part of the second brain instead of a flat scheduling surface.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Calendar defines the future intelligent temporal surface of N1Hub: branch-aware scheduling truth, richer distinction between committed and provisional time blocks, stronger rhythm-aware planning, and clearer control over review, focus, and autonomy windows.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
